risk_note: Watch for excessive frequency and diagnosis mismatch.
Watch for upcoding when documentation does not support complexity.
High-complexity services require strong documentation and medical necessity.
Repeated home health episodes can require utilization review.
DME billing requires medical necessity and supporting diagnosis.
High utilization or duplicate therapy billing can trigger review.
Low-cost procedure; bundling and repeated billing should be checked.
